name: Sue Storm (Malice)
description:
5 years have passed since Reed sacrificed himself against Doctor Doom, in the meantime Sue had some problems that made her became an anti-hero.

She killed countless of her past allies, like her brother, the thing, the creepy Namor, spider-man...

Had a lot of fun thinking about the background so I hope all of you also enjoy it :^) (adding smut for those that want to choose a side and don't want a story 😉)
creator: Niijima_alex
